betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Plutonium§f

§aPowerful artificial element — better than uranium in bombs and fuel, but more dangerous!§f

§bPlutonium§f is a radioactive artificial element that is generally much more powerful than uranium in both weapons and fuel roles, but also more hazardous.

§6Production§f:
§b• Breeding§f: breed natural uranium in a nuclear reactor
§b• Fuel Reprocessing§f: recycle spent nuclear fuel
§b• Nether Ore§f: if enabled in config; otherwise found in §bDesert Atom§f structures
§b• Asteroid Mining§f: powder and crystal forms from asteroid drops

§6Isotopes§f:
§b• Pu-238§f: RTG pellets, self-charging batteries (§e10§f HE/t)
§b• Pu-239§f: extremely useful in fuel and nuclear weapons
§b• Pu-240§f: mostly nuisance, moderate fuel role
§b• Pu-241§f: extremely powerful fuel/breeding material, very hard to obtain

§6Processing§f:
§b• Must be converted to §bPlutonium Hexafluoride§f for enrichment
§b• Enriched via§f Gas Centrifuge or SILEX
§b• Unenriched plutonium§f: used in §bEuphemium§f production via dark matter

§6Custom Nuke§f: contributes §e1.15×§f multiplier
§b• Breeding chain§f: Plutonium → Nuclear Waste

§eTip§f: Plutonium is obtained through breeding, not mining (unless Nether ore is enabled). Set up a breeding reactor using uranium to start your plutonium production!
